notes: Data-only Plant Identity Registry Foundation. Documents verified different-key identity mappings (variant slugs + cross-module keys) and separately records exact same-slug duplicate conflicts for a later merge-safe task. NOT wired into runtime. No plant records were renamed, merged, or deleted. Same-slug duplicates are documented, NOT resolved. Structure is extensible for a future stable plantId. Record references and line numbers are approximate provenance pointers captured during the read-only Canonical Identity Audit and must be re-verified before any cleanup.

canonicalIdentities.notes: Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. 'apple-tree' is an alias of 'apple' (both Malus domestica).
Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. 'pear-tree' is an alias of 'pear' (both Pyrus communis).
Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. 'peach-tree' is an alias of 'peach' (both Prunus persica).

Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. Both records use genus-level 'Prunus spp.' (also Prunus domestica / Prunus salicina in aliases); acceptedScientificName omitted because it is not reliable at species level. Needs review before assigning a species.
Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. 'fig-tree' is an alias of 'fig' (both Ficus carica).
Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. 'grape-vine' is an alias of 'grapevine' (both Vitis vinifera).
Variant slug pair within the inline PLANT_LIBRARY namespace. 'passion-fruit' is an alias of 'passionfruit' (both Passiflora edulis).
Cross-module key mapping. CARE_QUALITY_PROFILES uses 'mango-tree'; the inline PLANT_LIBRARY record uses slug 'mango'. Same species (Mangifera indica). No 'mango-tree' record exists in PLANT_LIBRARY.

Cross-module key mapping. CARE_QUALITY_PROFILES uses 'lychee-tree'; the inline PLANT_LIBRARY record uses slug 'lychee'. Same species (Litchi chinensis). No 'lychee-tree' record exists in PLANT_LIBRARY.
Cross-module key mapping. Garden Design manifest uses 'olive-tree'; the inline PLANT_LIBRARY record uses slug 'olive'. Same species (Olea europaea).
Cross-module key mapping. Garden Design manifest uses 'italian-cypress'; data/plants.seed.json uses slug 'cypress'. Same species (Cupressus sempervirens).

he name 'אבוקדו'. Second occurrence; wins in PLANT_INDEX via Object.fromEntries (last-key-wins).

duplicateConflicts.notes: Two distinct records share slug 'avocado'. Same species. Documented only. No record correction, merge, or deletion in this task.

observedRecords.notes: Conflicting spelling currently present. Second occurrence; wins in PLANT_INDEX via Object.fromEntries (last-key-wins).
